title: Credential exposure via third-party data breach (CrushFTP dataset)
description: Two employee email addresses appeared in a third-party breach dataset associated with CrushFTP. Reported passwords were bcrypt-hashed. No confirmed unauthorised access to corporate systems was stated in the source material; this record is a draft for human security review.
affected_systems: Systems using SSO via corporate email
immediate_actions_taken: Forced password reset on affected accounts
MFA confirmed active on affected accounts
No evidence of unauthorised access found in audit logs (per source analysis — requires human verification)
control_gaps_identified: No continuous monitoring for third-party credential exposure (gap vs typical ISO 27001 A.8.x identity/credential practices — map to company framework on review)
Password reuse policy status: Unknown — requires human review
recommended_next_steps: Implement breach monitoring for all staff email addresses
Review password reuse / credential hygiene policy
Add incident summary to next security committee agenda
Confirm whether any non-SSO apps used the same credentials
